title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; interact with the local Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI); chat like ChatGPT with your local models.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; stream, chat, pull models inside JVM apps.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; simple idiomatic interface to local LLMs.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI that wraps Ollama with conversation history and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s chat sidebar.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in production pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: function-calling, voice chat, RAG, Fine-tune adapters, Docker Compose stacks.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & CUDA) and docker-compose examples for Ollama.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Next.js chatbot template that streams Ollama responses with Tailwind and Vercel deploy button.

title: ollama-sdks
summary: Meta-repo tracking community SDKs for Go, C#, Rust, Swift and more.

title: ollama-gpt4all-convert
summary: Utility to convert GPT4All compatible quantized models into Ollama Modelfile format.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Streamlit app showing RAG pipeline using Ollama for local LLM and Chroma for embeddings.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package providing TypeScript-first client for the Ollama API.

title: ollama PyPI
summary: Official Python package on PyPI; chat, embed, pull and manage models programmatically.
